sections.heading: Sonoma County tree work, more than 40 years strong
sections.subheading: Discount Tree Service is Joe Pacheco's Santa Rosa tree company — a small, local crew that has trimmed, pruned and removed trees across Sonoma County for over 40 years, at competitive prices.

sections.heading: About Discount Tree Service
body: Discount Tree Service is a small, local tree company run by owner Joe Pacheco, who has lived in the Santa Rosa area his whole life and worked Sonoma County's trees for more than 40 years. The crew serves Santa Rosa, Kenwood, Sonoma, Windsor, Rohnert Park, Glen Ellen, Penngrove, Healdsburg and Sebastopol.

The company specializes in shaping, pruning, removals, view clearance, dead-wood removal and tree cleaning, along with stump grinding — quality tree work at competitive prices. Neighbors have given Discount Tree Service 22 Faves on Nextdoor, with reviewers noting Joe's careful coordination and tidy clean-up.

items.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
items.description: Shaping, safety pruning and dead-wood removal to keep your trees healthy and your property safe.

items.title: Tree Removal
items.description: Removal of hazardous, dead or overgrown trees, including trees overhanging neighboring properties.

items.title: View Clearance
items.description: Selective trimming and clearing to open up and protect your views.

items.title: Stump Grinding & Clean-Up
items.description: Stump grinding and thorough clean-up so the job is finished and your yard left tidy.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Discount Tree Service and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: The tree hung over 3 properties and Joe even helped coordinate with the neighbors to get the job done.
items.author: Verified Yelp review · Santa Rosa
